name: cuhack2026-gamemaster-rps
description: Gamemaster RPS — 2-laptop, camera-driven Rock-Paper-Scissors with a Gemini gamemaster, ElevenLabs voice, Solana coin ledger, and a MongoDB leaderboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w shared run build && npm -w client run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
